column2: Question
Does the institution have a well-being committee?
Does the institution offer counseling or therapy services?
If counseling services are offered, are they free of cost to the student?
If counseling services are offered, does the institution provide a method of contact (i.e., phone number, email address, or individual)?
Does the institution offer mindfulness training or courses to students?
Does the institution sponsor academic learning communities?
Does the institution sponsor identity-based communities or affinity groups?
Does the institution offer mentorship opportunities for students who are underrepresented in the field of medicine?
Does the institution host events that foster community-building, such as volunteering activities?
Does the institution host official networking, mentorship, or career guidance events?
Does the institution offer programs for physical activity or exercise?
If the institution does offer physical activity programs, are they free or low-cost?
Has the institution implemented a pass-fail grading system for the preclinical phase of student education?
Does the institution offer collaborative learning opportunities?
Does the institution have a designated attendance policy for students experiencing mental, physical, or emotional distress?
During students' clinical rotations, does the institution promote more longitudinal clinical rotation locations?
Does the institution integrate wellness competencies into its curriculum?
Does the institution have quality of education measures for teaching faculty?
